headline: Built a strict-pass audit bundle for the Dense Router Retrofit Enoch artifact, with existing metric validation, a fresh GB10 live smoke run, environment/memory evidence, manifest, hashes, and run notes.
limitations: This project audits one featured existing Enoch artifact; it does not re-run the selected artifact full medium-shape benchmark because the audit target is bundle strictness, not new scientific benchmarking.
Fresh live smoke confirms executable correctness and GB10 path health, but intentionally uses tiny shapes where speedup kill gates remain negative as documented by the selected artifact.
The selected Dense Router Retrofit artifact still requires real checkpoint/language-validation integration for final model-quality closure.
next_steps: If promoting the selected artifact, run its documented real-checkpoint next stage rather than expanding this audit bundle.
Use audit_bundle/build_strict_audit.py as a template for future featured-artifact gate automation.
project_name: Build one strict-pass featured Enoch artifact audit bundle

selected_artifact.selection_rationale: Highest-scoring locally inspectable positive Enoch artifact in the corpus scan: executable code, GB10 logs, CSV/JSON metrics, run notes, and a positive non-review decision.
